wizard.fillBlocksFirst: You must fill in all editable blocks before continuing.

viewMode.continuousHint: Whole document with inline editing on block click
viewMode.enterFullscreenTitle: Expand the document to 100% (Esc to exit)

table.rejectedTitle: This document was rejected in review.
table.noIndexPermission: You do not have permission to list documents (document.index).
table.emptyFiltered: There are no documents matching the current filters.
table.deadlineAria: Unpublished documents whose validation deadline is this date or earlier (published rows do not apply)

diff.noChangesVsTemplate: No changes from the original template.
diff.richContentChanged: Changes in images or other non-text content (check the block preview).

migration.stepSub: Adapt content to the new version
migration.intro: The template changed from version {{from}} to {{to}}. Review your previous content and add it to the new version's blocks.
migration.legend: Green: new version content · Red: your previous content.
migration.lockedHelp: This block is locked in the new version: content cannot be migrated.
migration.removedHelp: This block no longer exists in the new version. Copy it manually if you need it.
migration.removedSection_one: {{count}} block removed in the new version
migration.removedSection_other: {{count}} blocks removed in the new version
migration.removedAction: This block is no longer in the template:
migration.pendingDescription: You must choose an option for every block before continuing. Pending blocks:

blocks.requiredBlock: Required — this block must be filled
blocks.describeChangesPlaceholder: Describe the changes in this version...

history.noChanges: This block has no recorded changes.

preview.unresolvedCommentsBlocked: You cannot submit for validation while there are unresolved review comments
preview.draftAlreadyExistsDescription: You cannot create a new version of this document because {{author}} is already working on one.
preview.draftAlreadyExistsDuration_minutes_one: They have been working on the draft for {{count}} minute.
preview.draftAlreadyExistsDuration_minutes_other: They have been working on the draft for {{count}} minutes.
preview.draftAlreadyExistsDuration_hours_one: They have been working on the draft for {{count}} hour.
preview.draftAlreadyExistsDuration_hours_other: They have been working on the draft for {{count}} hours.
preview.draftAlreadyExistsDuration_days_one: They have been working on the draft for {{count}} day.
preview.draftAlreadyExistsDuration_days_other: They have been working on the draft for {{count}} days.

errors.noTemplate: A document cannot be created without a template.
errors.templateNoProcess: The selected template has no associated process.
errors.stillLoading: The document is still loading. Please wait a moment…

approve.description: Your approval will be recorded. If you are the last validator, the document will be published.

newVersion.description: A new editable draft will be created from the published version.

selector.empty: There are no usable templates to create documents with the current filters.
